title: Remove unfinished resize and keep only 0.4.0 focus plus 0.4.1 shuffle defaults
summary: 0.4.2 is a cleanup release. It removes the unfinished left-stick resize prototype entirely and returns the CUA input lane to the simpler 0.4.0-style focus and scrub behavior, while preserving the 0.4.1 playlist improvements: stable unique-random traversal and random-on plus playlist-loop defaults.
reasoning: The resize path had not worked yet and was adding unnecessary ambiguity to the input lane. The operator confirmed the 0.4.0 multi-screen focus behavior was already the right feel, so the correct move is to back out the resize experiment instead of carrying more control-splitting logic. The random playlist order and defaults from 0.4.1 are still good foundation behavior and should remain.

changes.summary: The left-stick host-scale prototype and all related scale tween logic were removed from the CUA input module.
changes.reasoning: Resize had not worked yet and should not stay in the release surface as a half-finished interaction seam.

changes.summary: CUA focus and scrub/navigation return to the simpler 0.4.0-style stick arbitration and gaze-targeted focus flow.
changes.reasoning: The operator confirmed the 0.4.0 focus behavior was already correct, so 0.4.2 should preserve that feel instead of keeping the 0.4.1 control split.

changes.summary: Random playback still stores a full shuffled playlist order plus cursor so next and previous do not repeat items until the entire list has been traversed.
changes.reasoning: That 0.4.1 playlist behavior is the desired foundation and remains part of this release.

changes.summary: New player records and pending playlist summaries still default to `random=on` and `loop=playlist`.
changes.reasoning: Those defaults match the current desired playback stance and pair naturally with the new unique-random traversal model.

verification: Compile the CUA player in Release after removing the left-stick resize seam and keeping the unique-random playlist logic and defaults.
Compile the no-input seam with EnablePlayerInputFeatures=false to bin\ReleaseNoInput\fa_cua_player.dll.
Stamp version 0.4.2 into player.version.json and BuildRuntimeInfo.cs.
Build and deploy the versioned fa_cua_player.0.4.2.dll and fa_player_asset.0.4.2.assetbundle through the existing player foundation script.
Run foundation release validation for 0.4.2 and keep the generated receipt beside the release shelf.
knownIssues: This release intentionally removes the resize experiment rather than replacing it. Left-stick resize will need a fresh future design when that lane is ready again.
Spatial audio controls remain a separate follow-up seam because the player runtime still initializes the underlying audio source as 2D.
The subscene-save and VaM slider serialization issues are not part of this release.
